calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Sigue Corporation aka Sigue

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:39:39 a.m., and concluding at 10:02:49 a.m. (D505)

George Aposhian, Esq. representing Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau.
Defendant Sigue Corporation aka Sigue not appearing.
Tanya Maslennikov, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

The Court summarizes briefly the request for judgment.
Counsel offers proof as to the request.
The Court examines witness. Witness testifies.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $170,383.33
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $13,864.07
Costs $568.31
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Total Judgment $187,640.71

Proposed judgment as modified is signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Continued To Jan-15-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
